data.title: Merck to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Expanding Its Hematology Pipeline With TERN-701, a Novel Candidate for Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML)
data.description: TERN-701, the primary candidate of Terns Pharmaceuticals, is undergoing Phase 1/2 trials. This drug is an experimental oral allosteric BCR::ABL1 tyrosine kinase inhibitor designed for specific patients with Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML).

data.title: Argus launches first Brazilian natural gas market price assessments
data.description: In an effort to increase transparency in the gas sector, a leading energy and commodity price reporting agency, Argus, has introduced the initial daily assessed price for Brazil's natural gas spot market. This move comes after Brazil recently opened up its natural gas market. The new daily price assessment is a significant step towards enhancing visibility and efficiency in the country's gas market. The launch is indicative of the growing importance of Brazil in the global energy landscape, highlighting the country's potential as a key player in the natural gas industry. This development provides market participants with crucial pricing information, facilitating better decision-making and fostering competition within the sector. It signifies a positive shift towards a more open and competitive gas market in Brazil.
MERCK & CO SEES CHARGE OF ABOUT $5.8B ON TERNS PHARMA DEAL
MERCK & CO INC ANTICIPATES A DEAL TO FINALIZE IN Q2 2026, INCURRING A CHARGE OF $5.8 BILLION OR AROUND $2.35 PER SHARE FOR Q2 AND FY2026 RESULTS.
MERCK AND CO INC'S DEAL HAS BEEN APPROVED BY BOTH BOARDS, AND THE CLOSING DEPENDS ON A MAJORITY OF TERNS STOCKHOLDERS TENDERING THEIR SHARES.
MERCK WILL PURCHASE TERNS PHARMACEUTICALS TO ENHANCE ITS HEMATOLOGY LINE WITH TERN-701, A NEW TREATMENT FOR CHRONIC MYELOID LEUKEMIA (CML).
MERCK & CO INC WILL ACQUIRE TERNS PHARMACEUTICALS FOR $53.00 PER SHARE, VALUING THE EQUITY AT $6.7 BILLION.
MERCK & CO TO BUY TERNS PHARMACEUTICALS FOR $53.00/SHR IN CASH
